profileIncomplete.prefix: To create an application, complete missing fields in

candidateEditScope.title: You have fixes to make
candidateEditScope.detailNotice: This feedback set remains active until the application is submitted again.
candidateEditScope.summaryDescription: The most important places to fix are listed below. Start with the first comment or jump to a specific place.
candidateEditScope.lockedRoundNotice: This feedback set is locked. If the commission finds new issues after resubmission, it will open a new set.
candidateEditScope.fixesPanelDescription: Read the comment and jump straight to the place that needs work.
candidateEditScope.currentFixHint: The current comment belongs to the step: {step}.
candidateEditScope.reviewQueueDescription: Move through comments in order or open the relevant step below.
candidateEditScope.generalAnnotationsDescription: These comments apply to the whole application, so read them before the detailed fixes.
candidateEditScope.groupedAnnotationsDescription: Open a step, read the short preview, then jump straight to the exact place that needs work.
candidateEditScope.annotationsDescription: The commission attached feedback to elements related to the step: {step}.
candidateEditScope.everythingEditable: The commission unlocked the whole application. Review the feedback and update the necessary places.
candidateEditScope.noFields: The commission did not unlock any top-level form fields in this set.
candidateEditScope.noRequirements: The commission did not unlock any requirements in this set.
candidateEditScope.attachmentsAllowed: You can add and remove general application attachments.
